name: Image Repair Add-on
description: Automatically retries broken attachment images on thread pages.

name: Masked + Direct Download Add-on
description: Combines masked-link skipper and direct-download flows in one trusted add-on.

name: Library Add-on
description: Quickly save thread snapshots into a personal library and manage them in a dedicated UI.

name: Example Add-on
description: Core API playground demonstrating every current addon-facing action through api modules.

name: Latest Filters Add-on
description: Adds one saved-filters button on Latest Updates with a searchable preset list and active filter tracking.

name: Halloween Theme Add-on
description: Forces Halloween logo/background theme with simple apply and teardown lifecycle.
